reviews.comment:
Recomiendo ir temprano ya que los fines de semana hay bastante fila para cargar nafta.
Los compresores para dar aire a las cubiertas no andaban muy bien . Fundamental q estén impecables.
El personal muy predispuesto a indicarnos lugares claves.

(Translated by Google)
I recommend going early, as there are long lines to fill up on weekends.
The compressors to inflate the tires weren't working very well. It's essential that they're spotless.
The staff was very willing to show us key locations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3c2JlQVJBEAE

reviews.comment:
No me puedo quejar! El playero toda la amabilidad , por demás , me brindaba servicio al auto que no correspondía con mi personalidad o nivel socio económico, a tanta amabilidad me incomode , se lo agradezco con propinas , jajaja

(Translated by Google)
I can't complain! The gas station attendant was incredibly kind, and he even gave me car service that didn't match my personality or socioeconomic level. His friendliness made me uncomfortable, but I thanked him with tips, hahaha.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdjd1ckdnEAE
